title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 17–20, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: CA... Captain Kuro!! If I go back to sea I won't tell anyone you're still alive,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey you're so selfish, tryin' to save only yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I won't tell anyone either, Captain Kuro! Just spare me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just please don't use that tech- nique!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I thought there would be a lot of treasure

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmmm... is the battle over already?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: It's no use!!! When he's using his "silent step" attack, he can't discern one person from another!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's so fast that even he doesn't know what he's attacking!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He won't stop that 'til he's tired!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: WH... what's going on...?! Those people are getting massaccred out of nowhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: At this rate, I don't know how many of us will die...

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
